revision.text: [[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{{1|Example User}}}]] ("[[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}]]"{{middot}}[[User talk:{{{1|Example User}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example User}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=move&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}}}} page moves]{{middot}}[[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}|block user]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} block log]) {{doc|content= Usage: {{Userlinks-tt|Example User}} {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Username internal link templates
revision.text: [[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{{1|Example User}}}]] ("[[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}]]"{{middot}}[[User talk:{{{1|Example User}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example User}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=move&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}}}} page moves]{{middot}}[[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}|block user]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} block log]) {{doc|content= Usage: {{Userlinks-tt|Example User}} {{Userspace linking templates}} }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: [[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{{1|Example User}}}]] ("[[User:{{{1|Example User}}}|{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}]]"{{middot}}[[User talk:{{{1|Example User}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|Example User}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=move&user={{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}}}} page moves]{{middot}}[[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example User}}}}}|block user]]{{middot}}[{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=block&page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|Example User}}}}}}} block log]) {{doc|content= Usage: {{Userlinks-tt|Example User}} {{Userspace linking templates}} }}
